## AnyActionsTree type

Alias for any actions tree. Use only when you really don't care about the actions type.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type AnyActionsTree = ActionsTree<Dictionary, Dictionary, MutationsDictionary<any>, ActionsDictionary<any>>;
```
